why_selected: Graduate Student Researcher pay scales provide the core research-labor benchmark for student-worker compensation.
Teaching Assistant Group 1 scales capture represented instructional student labor outside the highest-cost campuses.
Teaching Assistant Group 2 scales capture represented instructional student labor at Berkeley Los Angeles and San Francisco.
Teaching Fellow Group 1 rates provide a higher-responsibility instructional student-labor benchmark.
Teaching Fellow Group 2 rates provide a higher-responsibility instructional student-labor benchmark at the highest-cost campuses.
Postdoctoral scholar salary scales provide the standard research-labor benchmark between graduate labor and ladder-rank faculty.
Assistant Professor scales provide the early-career ladder-rank faculty benchmark.
Associate Professor scales provide the mid-career ladder-rank faculty benchmark.
Professor scales provide the senior ladder-rank faculty benchmark.
Lecturer with Potential Security of Employment scales provide an instructional-labor benchmark outside ladder ranks.
Lecturer with Security of Employment scales provide an instructional-labor benchmark with stronger appointment protections.
Senior Lecturer with Security of Employment scales provide a senior instructional-labor benchmark.
